regulations.name: Article 22 - Right to Explanation
regulations.description: People have the right to explanation for automated decisions

regulations.name: Article 5 - Data Minimization
regulations.description: Only collect data that is necessary
regulations.requirement: No unnecessary features in the model

regulations.name: Article 13 - Transparency
regulations.description: People must be informed about automated processing
regulations.requirement: Model logic must be explainable to users

regulations.name: Article 25 - Privacy by Design
regulations.description: Privacy must be built into the system from the start
regulations.requirement: No sensitive data used without necessity

regulations.name: Article 35 - Impact Assessment
regulations.description: High risk AI must have a Data Protection Impact Assessment
regulations.requirement: DPIA must be conducted for high risk AI

high.action: Requires conformity assessment, human oversight, transparency
